violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Equipment/utensil was not properly cleaned and sanitized between uses to prevent cross-contamination. -Unopened bags of shredded lettuce stored directly next to bin of open raw beef. *Corrected on-site, moved lettuce to different shelf. -Raw whole shell flats of eggs stored on 2nd from top wire shelf in walk in cooler.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani bucket at ice cream station found at less than 150ppm Quat solution. *COS-refilled bucket.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. -Both restroom doors were open during inspection. *COS - attached spring/closed.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -No date marking in refrigerators at cookline. (i.e. chopped ham, portioned crab meat, sliced tomatoes, etc.) -Macaroni salad in walk in cooler is not date marked.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue at refrigerator handles. -Some residue at utensil drawer handle. -Dust/debris buildup on fan near ice machine.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Ice bags are stored below a fly strip in dry storage area.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Water damaged ceiling in walk in cooler.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
